start.cmd_link: • /link <code> — link this chat to a place
start.event_not_found: Event not found or already passed.
start.register_open: Tap a button below to register.

help.body:
Available commands:
/start — greeting and chat id
/start ev_<id> — open an event and register
/link <code> — link chat to a place
/unlink <code> — unlink
/announce_next — announce next event for linked place
/templates — templates for linked place
/new_template — create a weekly template (DM, admins only)

unlink.not_linked: ℹ️ This chat was not linked to {name}

templates.empty: No templates in this chat. Link the chat with /link <code> and create templates in the admin UI.

announce.not_linked: This chat is not linked to any place. Use /link.
announce.no_events: No upcoming events for linked places. Create one in the admin UI or wait for template materialization.

registration.list_dm_failed: Could not DM the list. Message the bot with /start first.
registration.window_closed: Registration opens 24h before start and closes at kickoff
registration.full: All seats and waitlist spots taken
registration.waitlisted: No free seats — added to waitlist ⏳

wizard.dm_only: Run /new_template in a private chat with the bot.
wizard.no_places: Your Telegram account is not linked to any place admin role. Sign in on the web app first, then try again.
wizard.pick_place: Pick a place (reply with the number):
wizard.invalid_pick: Send a number from the list.
